Tests that Math.max() without arguments does not return Infinity.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.max` function in JavaScript. It checks that calling `Math.max` with no arguments does not return `Infinity`. This test ensures that the function behaves as expected when it receives an empty argument list, which is a specific edge case. The script uses the `assert` function to perform the check, which will throw an error if the condition is false.
